name: hello-bioinformatics
description: A minimal demo skill that greets a list of sample IDs and produces a formatted report — used to verify the Skill Builder pipeline end-to-end
author: ClawBio Skill Builder (auto-generated demo)
capabilities: Accept a list of sample IDs from a plain-text file (one per line)
Produce a formatted markdown report greeting each sample
Write a machine-readable result.json with sample count and IDs
Provide a full reproducibility bundle (commands.sh + environment.yml)

input_formats.required_fields: one sample ID per line (lines starting with # are comments)
